title: Assert complete MCP tool registration set
description: Current: integration coverage does not assert the registered MCP tool inventory, so missing registrations can slip through. Expected: registration test compares actual registered tool names against the shared matrix and fails on missing, extra, or duplicate entries.
acceptance_criteria: Test verifies registered tool names exactly match matrix entries
Test asserts no duplicate tool names are registered
Test output identifies missing/extra names when assertion fails
out_of_scope: Deep validation of each tool response payload
